creator: osidorkin@gmail.com
text:
> Hi,
> 
> The patch is wrong, MASTER_SITES not found with release "1.0.0". The port
>  too already have version 1.0.2. It would be interesting you send the patch
>  to the new version.
> 

Hi,

I'm already using 1.0.2. 
The updated patch is in attachment.

Note that I've disabled sqlite3 because I don't know how to build and place 
the qt plugin required correctly.
